name: Baked Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cannellini (White Kidney Beans), rinsed and drained (15-oz. each)
1 can Stewed Tomatoes with Juice (14-1/2 Oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until soft, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in chili powder and mustard for 1 minute.
4. Add water, beans, tomatoes with their juices, and molasses to the pan.
5. Simmer the soup for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Break up large chunks of tomatoes with the back of a spoon if needed.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Makes 2 generous servings; can be doubled. For a thicker soup, remove one cup of beans, mash them into a paste, and stir them back in. Serve with coleslaw and cornbread squares for a complete meal. A simple baked apple makes an excellent final touch. Recipe from Bon Appetit, March, 1993 - "30-Minute Main Courses" Source: Bon Appetit - March, 1993
